subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 07/17] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for svc_export cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the potential for duplicate processing of export requests and suggested adding a check to prevent it. Also asked for more information on how the netlink setup silently fails in older kernels.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch adds netlink-based support for the svc_export cache, allowing userspace to receive notifications of pending export requests from the kernel and respond accordingly. The existing procfs channel mechanism is retained as a fallback in case the kernel does not support the nfsd genetlink family or the 'exportd' multicast group.
